description_long: This guard rail consists of a long, rectangular metal frame with three horizontal rails running parallel along its length. The structure is divided into two sections, with the right section featuring a slightly different arrangement of rails, possibly for added reinforcement or design. The frame appears to be constructed from steel or a similar metal, with a dark, weathered finish that suggests durability and outdoor use. The rails are supported by vertical posts at intervals, though the posts are integrated into the frame rather than extending below it. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. There are no reflective markings or additional safety features visible on the surface.
description: A long, rectangular metal guard rail with three horizontal rails and a dark, weathered finish, divided into two sections for reinforcement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with three horizontal rails and a clear division into two sections.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the guard rail, emphasizing its narrow depth and rectangular cross-section.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the three horizontal rails and the division into two sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the consistent rectangular shape.
